title: Uwulend - Rekt
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation attack involving flash loans to manipulate price feeds and exploit lending protocols

prevention.rule: Block any tx that uses flash loans to manipulate oracle prices followed by liquidation at an inflated rate
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN -> manipulate oracle price -> liquidate at inflated rate

red_flags: large trades with borrowed tokens to manipulate oracle prices
price discrepancy between borrowing and liquidation rates
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TRANSACTION THAT INVOLVES FLASH LOANS FOLLOWED BY PRICE MANIPULATION AND LIQUIDATION AT AN INFLATED RATE
summary: UwuLend was hacked for $19.4 million via an oracle manipulation attack using flash loans to artificially inflate prices and exploit the lending protocol. A concrete prevention rule would be to block any transaction involving flash loans followed by price manipulation and liquidation at an inflated rate.
